1782142149137.what_to_submit: You will be creating a short 2mins ads for animato studio pro , using the frame by frame animation section of this app and you will be uploading the project file to Dropbox and provide us with the link for revision and also you will be posting it on any of your social media accounts and also provide us with the direct link to the social media account you posted it and our judges will judge your submissions as follows: we will grant the winner 🏆 to the contester that used the most creative use of the frame by frame animation section and also the contester with the most social media likes , comments about the app etc so Goodluck
